abilities.description: Blasts the target enemy unit with damaging frost, dealing area damage and slowing movement and attack rates for 4 seconds. The primary target receives both base and area damage.
abilities.name: Frost Blast
abilities.story: Frost-mage Ethreain has not forgotten even the simplest of ice manipulation.

abilities.description: Applies a magical frost shield around the target, reducing damage from attacks against you. While the shield is active, ice magic will affect nearby enemy units every 1 second, dealing minor damage and slowing them.
abilities.name: Frost Shield
abilities.story: First conceived of to protect him in his mortal years, the frost magic that Ethreain weaves around himself has only grown colder with time.

abilities.description: Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the two of you and drains a percentage of its current mana.
abilities.name: Sinister Gaze

abilities.description: Creates an Ice Spire at the target spot, slowing enemies around it. Can take 5 hero hits or 10 creep hits and when destroyed it will create a Frost Blast around it. Chain Frost can bounce to the Spire if there are no other enemies in range. Lich can cast Frost Shield on the Spire. Each Frost Shield tick will heal the spire by 1 hero attack.
abilities.name: Ice Spire

abilities.description: Releases an orb of frost that bounces between nearby enemy units up to 10 times, slowing and damaging each time it hits. Each bounce increases the damage for the subsequent bounces.
params: Passive Component[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Number of Casts on Death: 1[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Search Radius: [picture:cast_range_symbol] 750
abilities.name: Chain Frost
abilities.story: Almost universally considered the ultimate in frost magic, Ethreain's orb of frozen death strikes fear into those who dare stand against him.

description: Unleashes a powerful attack that bounces between enemies. Resurrected by a curious geomancer, Ethreain bewitched his savior with a Sinister Gaze, then promptly made the man his newest sacrifice. Finally freed from the depths of the Black Pool, the Lich returns to wreak icy destruction on the world. Cloaking his followers with a Frost Shield, Ethreain floats across the battlefield to Blast any who cross him. A frozen orb descends on his foes, traveling between foes and Ice Spires until the Chain Frost brings all opposition to their demise.  Support Nuker  Blue, Flying, Icy, Undead, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Lich's voice actor, Gary Schwartz also voiced the Heavy and Demoman classes in "Team Fortress 2", another title by Valve. Lich's line upon casting Sacrifice, Link▶️ "Om nom nom!" refers to a line spoken by the Heavy which he uses upon consuming the Sandvich Edible Device.
Lich's line upon casting Sacrifice, Link▶️ "Om nom nom!" refers to a line spoken by the Heavy which he uses upon consuming the Sandvich Edible Device.
